name: OcasioCortez.com
subject: Child Tax Credit check-in!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
It’s estimated that the expanded child tax credit, together with other measures in the American Rescue Plan, could help lift 5 million children out of poverty.
# [](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/143?refcode=em20210716-2283-header&t=1&akid=2283%2E2526796%2EbCuMTI)
In March, Congress expanded the Child Tax Credit as part of President Biden’s American Rescue Package. Millions of families received their first payment yesterday.
It’s estimated that the expanded child tax credit, together with other measures in the American Rescue Plan, could help lift 5 million children out of poverty — cutting childhood poverty in half, and making it the largest anti-poverty program in a generation.
[So, we want to know: if you are receiving a child tax credit payment — how is it going to help you and your family? Share your story here.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/child-tax-check-in/?refcode=em20210716-2283-P&source=em20210716-2283&t=2&akid=2283%2E2526796%2EbCuMTI)
**[Child Tax Credit check-in!](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/child-tax-check-in/?refcode=em20210716-2283-P&source=em20210716-2283&t=3&akid=2283%2E2526796%2EbCuMTI)**
**Here are answers to some frequently asked questions about the expanded child tax credit:**
**Q:** Who is eligible for the expanded child tax credit?
**A:** Single parents with incomes up to $75,000, couples who file jointly and earn up to $150,000, and heads of households earning up to $112,500 will be eligible for the full expanded credit. Families who earn more than $150,000 will likely qualify for a reduced credit. For every child under the age of six, families will get up to $3,600 this year, or $300 per month. For every child ages 6-17, the amount is $3,000, or $250 per month.
If you’re a parent of a child under 18 and received a stimulus check via direct deposit, your first monthly CTC check should have hit your bank account yesterday.
If you got your stimulus check via mail, your CTC check was sent out yesterday and should hit your mailbox soon.
If you did not get your stimulus check or didn’t file taxes because you make under the reporting threshold, you can [register with the IRS here to receive your payments.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/9242?t=4&akid=2283%2E2526796%2EbCuMTI)
**Q:** What if I’m undocumented?
**A:** Undocumented folks with children who have social security numbers qualify for the tax credit. Their child must have a social security number issued before May 17, 2021. However, to sign up to receive the funds, undocumented parents or guardians must have Individual Taxpayer Identification Numbers (ITIN).
**Q:** What if I had a baby this year?
**A:** The IRS will be updating their site in a few weeks with a portal where you can update your family information and enroll in the CTC program for your baby.
This program is an example of what’s possible when government is oriented towards making working people's lives better, instead of just enriching the wealthy.
Alexandria is fighting for measures and policies like the expanded child tax credit and funeral assistance because she believes government's job is to help families make ends meet.
[If you received an expanded child tax credit payment, let us know how it will help you and your family recover from the pandemic and submit any questions you have about how to receive this benefit.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/survey/child-tax-check-in/?refcode=em20210716-2283-P&source=em20210716-2283&t=5&akid=2283%2E2526796%2EbCuMTI)
In solidarity,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ocasio-campaign?refcode=em20210716-2283-P&t=6&refcode2=2283_2526796_bCuMTI&akid=2283%2E2526796%2EbCuMTI)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=7&akid=2283%2E2526796%2EbCuMTI) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=8&akid=2283%2E2526796%2EbCuMTI) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=9&akid=2283%2E2526796%2EbCuMTI)
Email us: [us@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: us@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=10&akid=2283%2E2526796%2EbCuMTI)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=2283%2E2526796%2EbCuMTI)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

name: Larry Elder
subject: What happened to the California dream, Peter?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR GOVERNOR 2021
body:
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57956355:6sEsVMlaN:m:1:3253819041:B91B7E9D7D8D6E1586649BEAF4C428B1:r)

---
Peter,

My name is Larry Elder and I'm a business owner, talk show host, author, a contributor on Fox News and above all, I'm a proud Californian.

But I can't stand to watch Gavin Newsom destroy our state or let the Democrats continue their assault on middle and working-class Californians - **which is why I 'm announcing that I am running for Governor of California as a Republican in the recall election!**

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57956355:6sEsVMlaN:m:1:3253819041:B91B7E9D7D8D6E1586649BEAF4C428B1:r)
My high school-dropout father worked TWO full time jobs as a janitor in Los Angeles. But he was a hard worker, he saved his nickels and dimes until he could buy us a house in South Central Los Angeles.

At that time, **this was the American dream and California was where people came to achieve it.** Now, our over-reaching, leftist dominated government has made this dream nearly **impossible to achieve.**

Today's California is a sad state of affairs. **Our taxes are rising almost as fast as our crime rates, and our homeless population accounts for 25% of the whole country 's and only is growing under a Democrat dominated government.** [**We must end the Democrats ' full control of our state before it's too late, Peter. Can I count in you to help me do that?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57956355:6sEsVMlaN:m:1:3253819041:B91B7E9D7D8D6E1586649BEAF4C428B1:r)

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57956355:6sEsVMlaN:m:1:3253819041:B91B7E9D7D8D6E1586649BEAF4C428B1:r)
Enough is enough, and I refuse to watch while Gavin Newsom ruins our state with abusive executive order after executive order. His draconian control has gone too far!

During the pandemic, he dined for $35,000 at the French Laundry without a mask with the same health officials and lobbyists that imposed the shutdown! **Meanwhile businesses he didn 't frequent weren't allowed to stay open. Peter,

My name is Larry Elder and I'm a business owner, talk show host, author, a contributor on Fox News and above all, I'm a proud Californian.

But I can't stand to watch Gavin Newsom destroy our state or let the Democrats continue their assault on middle and working-class Californians - **which is why I 'm announcing that I am running for Governor of California as a Republican in the recall election!**

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57956723:6EMOwMlNh:m:1:3253819041:56B14E44C745BDD1DD6FBF3F71D06086:r)
My high school-dropout father worked TWO full time jobs as a janitor in Los Angeles. But he was a hard worker, he saved his nickels and dimes until he could buy us a house in South Central Los Angeles.

At that time, **this was the American dream and California was where people came to achieve it.** Now, our over-reaching, leftist dominated government has made this dream nearly **impossible to achieve.**

Today's California is a sad state of affairs. **Our taxes are rising almost as fast as our crime rates, and our homeless population accounts for 25% of the whole country 's and only is growing under a Democrat dominated government.** [**We must end the Democrats ' full control of our state before it's too late, Peter. Can I count in you to help me do that?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57956723:6EMOwMlNh:m:1:3253819041:56B14E44C745BDD1DD6FBF3F71D06086:r)

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57956723:6EMOwMlNh:m:1:3253819041:56B14E44C745BDD1DD6FBF3F71D06086:r)
Enough is enough, and I refuse to watch while Gavin Newsom ruins our state with abusive executive order after executive order. His draconian control has gone too far!

During the pandemic, he dined for $35,000 at the French Laundry without a mask with the same health officials and lobbyists that imposed the shutdown! **Meanwhile businesses he didn 't frequent weren't allowed to stay open. He shut down in-school learning while his own children enjoyed the luxury of private in-school instruction.**

I'm absolutely sick and tired of watching our state crumble under Newsom's failed Democrat-led dictatorship. **Our businesses should be open, our schools should be open. Opportunity doesn 't come from prolonged covid stimulus that should have ended months ago. It is forged in a thriving and free economy and top-notch schools - neither of which exists in California under Newsom.**

Peter, I know that I have what it takes to restore California to its former state of bountiful opportunity, but I'm going to need you on my team every step of the way. With only a short amount of time remaining until the election, [**will you join my team?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57956723:6EMOwMlNh:m:1:3253819041:56B14E44C745BDD1DD6FBF3F71D06086:r)

[**California is in desperate need of strong, common-sense conservative leadership right now and I 'm willing to step up to the plate to help stop Gavin Newsom from further destroying California. Are you with me?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57956723:6EMOwMlNh:m:1:3253819041:56B14E44C745BDD1DD6FBF3F71D06086:r)

Thank you,

Larry Elder

body:
New Jersey’s gubernatorial election is right around the corner. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32544847/296100264/823540626?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDM2MmU0OC0wN2U3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UR9SAqwd-rASMSPDJTGDvee0l6ZtOaDBPVuSldcq1gI=&emci=90ac9554-84e5-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=a4362e48-07e7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=1049176)
Hi Peter, For the last six months, we’ve seen Republicans across the country use Donald Trump’s Big Lie to justify passing anti-voter policies wherever they can. That’s why it’s more important than ever that Democrats join together to elect leaders we can count on to defend our rights — leaders like Governor Phil Murphy. **It’s up to the voters of New Jersey to re-elect Phil and state Democrats in November, but we can _all_ lend them our support, even from all the way in North Carolina.** **[Today, I’m asking you to join me in supporting New Jersey Democrats by splitting a grassroots contribution of any size to Team Cooper and the New Jersey Democratic State Committee. Your gift will help hold the state legislature and the governor’s mansion for Democrats.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32544848/296100265/429582278?refcode=em_RC_FR_Murphy_tandem_071721_L1_h&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDM2MmU0OC0wN2U3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UR9SAqwd-rASMSPDJTGDvee0l6ZtOaDBPVuSldcq1gI=)** Here’s the truth: Phil’s opponent would be _bad news_ for New Jersey. Jack Ciattarelli is a career politician who went all-in for Donald Trump — even attending a “Stop the Steal” rally after the 2020 election. He’s aligned himself with the radical right, all the while trying to portray himself as a moderate. We have to help make sure New Jerseyans aren’t fooled by Ciattarelli. **[New Jersey Democrats up and down the ballot need to connect with voters and make sure they understand just how critical this election is, but that’ll take resources. You can help keep New Jersey blue by chipping in to Team Cooper and the NJ Democratic State Committee right now>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32544850/296100266/429582278?refcode=em_RC_FR_Murphy_tandem_071721_L2_h&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDM2MmU0OC0wN2U3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UR9SAqwd-rASMSPDJTGDvee0l6ZtOaDBPVuSldcq1gI=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [SPLIT $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32544851/296100267/429582278?refcode=em_RC_FR_Murphy_tandem_071721_express10_h&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDM2MmU0OC0wN2U3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UR9SAqwd-rASMSPDJTGDvee0l6ZtOaDBPVuSldcq1gI=)

name: Ralph Northam
subject: Virginia’s "rip roaring” economy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead PO Box 597
body:
| | | [](https://act.myngp.com/el/Kd7o7QVNRLpIp9pH-BogtmSAf_uoYsseRJCt3lFWR1g=/63cXn9dG3LOKSIAuoS9klfqjSiCINxmZ-im_euWOSJs=?refcode=20210717_RN_TRM)
---
Friend, Glenn Youngkin likes to say that Virginia's economy is in a ditch -- that he'll give us back a "rip roaring" economy. There's only one problem with that -- **the facts.** Virginia's economy isn't in a ditch. In fact, a recent CNBC report found that Virginia is the best state in the United States for business. We're leading the way with economic recovery from COVID-19, and we've got an unemployment rate well under the national average. Under my leadership, we've seen Virginia consistently lead the nation as the best state for business, and friend, we need to keep it that way. **[Will you pitch in $15 or more right now to help Terry lead Virginia to economic prosperity yet again?](https://act.myngp.com/el/Kd7o7QVNRLpIp9pH-BogtmSAf_uoYsseRJCt3lFWR1g=/63cXn9dG3LOKSIAuoS9klfqjSiCINxmZ-im_euWOSJs=?refcode=20210717_RN_TRM)** We need a real leader who understands what it takes to build the strongest economy in America. What Glenn Youngkin wants to do is enact failed tax policies that have been proven to destroy economies, pass hard-right culture warrior laws that would turn away business, and bankrupt the state. Glenn Youngkin won't make our economy "rip roaring." He'll drag us down and drive away business with his extremist policies. **[Please, donate right now to keep Virginia 's economy on the right track under Terry.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Kd7o7QVNRLpIp9pH-BogtmSAf_uoYsseRJCt3lFWR1g=/63cXn9dG3LOKSIAuoS9klfqjSiCINxmZ-im_euWOSJs=?refcode=20210717_RN_TRM)** Thank you, Ralph Northam

name: Team Crist
subject: the Koch network has entered the race
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
Republicans are already spending big to protect DeSantis because they know we can beat him.
|
---
|
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/AF0I9dFHwsbx-wYJoKWtIw==/rtcbzhF2xgTqOgGCS7xVEA==?refcode=20210717_f_1_fl)
Friend,

The race for Florida governor just got more interesting:

A new ad campaign backed by none other than **the Koch network is praising Ron DeSantis** for his record as governor! We don't know about you, but in our eyes a bungled COVID response and a pattern of prioritizing the interests of wealthy communities over everyday Floridians is nothing to be proud of.

To make matters worse, a new, right-wing platform called _El American_ has begun publishing pro-DeSantis content targeting Latino voters in Florida. They're backed by a shady group of investors and use language that makes even _FOX News_ look moderate in comparison.

These are just two of many examples of right-wing media outlets promoting disinformation in an effort to sway opinions and influence elections. **We are going to need all the help we can get to keep our messaging out there and combat these deceitful actions by right-wing media outlets.**
[PITCH IN TO HELP US CORRECT THE RECORD AND DEFEAT DESANTIS](https://act.myngp.com/el/AF0I9dFHwsbx-wYJoKWtIw==/rtcbzhF2xgTqOgGCS7xVEA==?refcode=20210717_f_1_fl&amount=20)
Here's the deal: Republicans are already spending big to protect Gov. DeSantis because they know we can beat him. And while groups like the Koch network and _El American_ may have nearly unlimited amounts of money at their disposal, we have something even better: Grassroots support from people like _you_.

We can beat Gov. DeSantis, but **we need you in our corner** to make it happen. A grassroots organization needs resources to pay for everything from clipboards, pens, and paper -- to ads on TV, radio, and the internet. And every single donation, no matter how small, adds up to make a _big_ difference.

**So friend, if you 're able, please pitch in today to help us fight back against Gov. DeSantis and his big money allies so we can finally build a Florida for _all_ Floridians:**

We need the House of Delegates to move VA forward

|

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32547129/296109073/-793144256?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTdkZTM3MC0wZGU3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W0fgSapSsT6JxCh4FdRMgkM4V5lxeEB02LaRGKmvrIA=&emci=ea023f52-73e6-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=fe7de370-0de7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15759664)

| | Derek,

There’s a reason we fought tooth and nail in 2017 and 2019 to take a majority in the House of Delegates -- it allowed us to pass landmark legislation like the Virginia Voting Rights Act, ratify the Equal Rights Amendment, legalize marijuana, create commonsense gun safety laws, and remove antiquated racist and homophobic laws from the books.

**Virginia Democrats have a proven track record of leadership, progressive values, and the ability to get things done in Richmond --[and we’re asking for your support to help us keep leading Virginia forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32547130/296109074/453872771?refcode=ris_20210717_e_f_us_na_na_housend&refcode2=rti&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTdkZTM3MC0wZGU3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W0fgSapSsT6JxCh4FdRMgkM4V5lxeEB02LaRGKmvrIA=)**

When Democrats win, good things happen. When Republicans have control, our Commonwealth takes a giant step backward. Republicans in the House have made it clear that they won’t hesitate to pass laws that will restrict voting rights, limit access to reproductive health care, and roll back all of the progress we’ve made. They want to follow Donald Trump’s playbook of dog-whistle politics and regressive policies.

**[If you want to see our Commonwealth move forward, please donate to the Democratic Party of Virginia today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32547131/296109075/453872771?refcode=ris_20210717_e_f_us_na_na_housend&refcode2=rti&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDIzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZTdkZTM3MC0wZGU3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=W0fgSapSsT6JxCh4FdRMgkM4V5lxeEB02LaRGKmvrIA=)**

Andrew

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Please let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
A lot of our opponents are taking money from corporate PACs
#

Friend,
I’m reaching out to ask you to make a $3 contribution to our campaign to keep our July fundraising on track.
**Will you give me a moment to explain why your $3 is so important?**
Pennsylvania's Senate race is the most important race in the whole country. I know that sounds exaggerated, but it's true.
You see, Republican Pat Toomey's retirement means we're running for an open seat — and flipping this seat is our best chance at expanding on Democrats' 51-50 Senate majority.
Imagine what we could do with an even bigger Democratic majority — and a Senate where working families truly have a voice.
That's why the competition is so fierce. And it's why a lot of our opponents are taking money from corporate PACs to help them stay in the race.
**But I refuse to do that. I'm running to represent working folks — people like my family and yours — not CEOs and big money.**
So my campaign is powered by grassroots donations: Real people who believe in our movement, chipping in a few bucks at a time.
That's why I'm asking you to make a $3 contribution today. We need a surge of grassroots support today to keep our fundraising on track for the month.
[If you're able, will you pitch in that $3 before you close this email? Your donation makes a powerful statement that people-power is greater than big money.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32547810/296112240/-353695395?refcode2=9e40ccad-0fe7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&refcode=em210717-1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZTQwY2NhZC0wZmU3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=azNRayZV6IXackG_rqHsGm5iIHEiA_FbGQ8-2dH2irs=)

clean_body: A lot of our opponents are taking money from corporate PACs Friend, I’m reaching out to ask you to make a $3 contribution to our campaign to keep our July fundraising on track. Will you give me a moment to explain why your $3 is so important? Pennsylvania's Senate race is the most important race in the whole country. I know that sounds exaggerated, but it's true. You see, Republican Pat Toomey's retirement means we're running for an open seat — and flipping this seat is our best chance at expanding on Democrats' 51-50 Senate majority. Imagine what we could do with an even bigger Democratic majority — and a Senate where working families truly have a voice. That's why the competition is so fierce. And it's why a lot of our opponents are taking money from corporate PACs to help them stay in the race. But I refuse to do that. I'm running to represent working folks — people like my family and yours — not CEOs and big money. So my campaign is powered by grassroots donations: Real people who believe in our movement, chipping in a few bucks at a time. That's why I'm asking you to make a $3 contribution today. We need a surge of grassroots support today to keep our fundraising on track for the month. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Thanks in advance for your support. All my best, Malcolm * Paid for by Malcolm PAC Malcolm PAC PO Box 22395 Philadelphia, PA 19110 United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. name: Erica Smith
subject: I'm speaking my truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
The rural way of life runs through my veins.
#
Hi there, it’s Erica!
Asking for financial support is critical, but _always_ uncomfortable.
**So let me tell you more about my childhood in North Carolina,[_before humbly asking you to make your very first $5 donation to our campaign for U.S. Senate._](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/5433?refcode=em20210717-259&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=259%2E3698%2E0zkvjw)**
I am the descendant of slaves. I grew up hearing stories from my great-grandfather, the child of slaves, about the Jim Crow South.
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/5433?refcode=em20210717-259&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=259%2E3698%2E0zkvjw)
My five siblings and I were raised on a dirt road in rural North Carolina — the same dirt road that our mother was raised on. My dad served in the Air Force. We lived on a family farm in rural North Carolina, picking cucumbers and corn. The rural way of life still runs through my veins.
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/5433?refcode=em20210717-259&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=259%2E3698%2E0zkvjw)
Growing up Black in the South was difficult, as was farming. **I know what it means to struggle.** But our elders taught us the dignity of work and the value of faith. I'm not asking you to "believe it." I am speaking my truth. I am speaking OUR truth.
And in fact, the struggles my family faced are the same ones that North Carolina families face today. We’re fighting eviction, poverty, and crippling medical bills. We’re fighting for climate justice as floods and storms claim our livelihoods.
That is why I’m running for the U.S. Senate — to create opportunities for communities like mine. No community overlooked, no one counted out. **Together we can win a Green New Deal, guaranteed single-payer health care, reparations, and so much more.**
[****](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/5433?refcode=em20210717-259&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=259%2E3698%2E0zkvjw)
If elected, I will fight like hell for North Carolina — and I’d be the first Black woman to ever represent the state on the federal level, let alone in the U.S. Senate!
[**_If you’re with me, will you please make your first donation of $5 to our campaign for U.S. Senate? By donating, you’re taking a personal stake in our unapologetic campaign._**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/5433?refcode=em20210717-259&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=259%2E3698%2E0zkvjw)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/5433?refcode=em20210717-259&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=24&akid=259%2E3698%2E0zkvjw)**
Thank you from the bottom of my heart,
Erica
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210717-259-footer&t=25&refcode2=259_3698_0zkvjw&akid=259%2E3698%2E0zkvjw)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=26&akid=259%2E3698%2E0zkvjw)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ericaforus.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=259%2E3698%2E0zkvjw)

Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022

name: me, Scalise, DeSantis (2)
subject: This is BY FAR the most important email you'll read this year. 📨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Here's your chance to make an essential difference for the future of America.
Hello, it's Steve Scalise here following up for Ron DeSantis.
**This is BY FAR the most important email you'll read this year.**
President Trump made it crystal clear that he needs ALL Conservatives \-- including me, you, and Ron -- to do our part to defend our America first movement.
[**Ron asked for your help. Now I'm asking for it too. Here's your chance to make an essential difference for the future of America.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57956933:J513iMlhN:m:1:3253819041:707B4E30CB7973590094CF88DFB3DE16:r)
If $25 or $50 is too much, I completely understand. Every little bit helps when the stakes are this high. Even just $5 or $10 can make a world of difference.
Please send in support before it's too late. We really need you.
_\-- Steve Scalise (Republican Whip)_
_\---------- Forwarded Message ----------_
To: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57956933:J513iMlhN:m:1:3253819041:707B4E30CB7973590094CF88DFB3DE16:r)
From: **Ron DeSantis**
Subject: You know me. I'm not one to mince words.

Hey Peter, it's Governor Ron DeSantis. You know me -- I'm not one to mince words.
**Neither is President Trump.**
That's why I proudly supported him when he just made this bold statement: _" The survival of America depends upon our ability to elect Republicans at every level."_
The Liberal Media, the Radical Socialists in Congress, and Joe Biden's cronies are plowing ahead to fundamentally change everything that makes America great.
[**I 'm asking for you to help Republicans right now!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57956934:J513iMlhN:m:1:3253819041:707B4E30CB7973590094CF88DFB3DE16:r)
Our country is at a crossroad.
We either let the Democrats turn America into a Socialist country and tear President Trump's legacy apart...
**OR we come together and prove that our America first movement is worth fighting for!**
[**If every Patriot chips in a few bucks, we will have the resources to elect Republicans up and down the ballot!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57956933:J513iMlhN:m:1:3253819041:707B4E30CB7973590094CF88DFB3DE16:r)
_This won't be easy -- we need your help._
...And you don't strike me as someone who gives up when the going gets tough.
**That 's why I'm coming directly to you, Peter. Are you in?**
For America,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57956933:J513iMlhN:m:1:3253819041:707B4E30CB7973590094CF88DFB3DE16:r)
Ron DeSantis

subject: They're rigging the game
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013YZjCSnhh8mrdDNGknEHIyLAEEb2xnwnmx9I8b_851Yotzi-cxOm8dsko7dDKwsMcmjNIFN1132KlRaK_4dkjueM558vIECyF6dviCRHSXpTu2RByiaDGvZ2iLo2WLg6fXs5ZIEV-ZQ2Sl6tG1JUI5RMVOYRpgDBJqz65YYDUkL826t-FRJSR_nKC8Jy2loFD2_sMumU29yKJ8ORV0-rijsgrxuZb-SpjNtqjlLJQIMXrDvXycyyN2KQ50uV7caRn43IJlby7RlN_ADkkfcksw==&c=eNSYnI_H0tcGwht7rT7Dab7gEt7ZbccamSQsaxhEBVDPdOgarEzqjg==&ch=FUzCLPLSj47Aq_fX1XqcFxi-8QiuXJpI1VBiHiJq8CH6-XVfnZE42A==)
---
|
Peter-
Dan Crenshaw here.
This week, I continued to expose the lies Democrats are spreading about Texas election reform. This is the brutal truth: Biden doesn't think Cuban refugees fleeing communism or Afghans who fought with U.S. troops will vote for Democrats. That's right. Biden knows that Cubans and other immigrants who have ACTUALLY suffered under socialism are against his party's socialist policies. And he knows that Afghans who fought alongside American troops and love our country will not vote for leftist politicians who despise America. That's why he is shutting the door on them. It's a shameful, purely political display by a party that claims to be "compassionate." We should never give these people more power. | | | | CRITICAL RACE THEORY IS A NATIONAL SECURITY THREAT | == | == I know for a fact that critical race theory is a threat to national security. I hear from service members all the time about military leaders prioritizing woke training over actually preparing our troops for war. That's why I commissioned a report to prove it. Our report found "numerous cultural and structural issues that impact the morale and readiness of the Navy's surface force" and "an insufficient focus on warfighting skills, the perception of a zero-defect mentality accompanied by a culture of micromanagement, and over-sensitivity and responsiveness to modern media culture." Enough is enough. It's already unacceptable that our service members are forced to participate in leftist training exercises. But when it threatens national security, that's when we have no choice but to act. I'm going to continue to expose this and put the pressure on our military leaders to make a change IMMEDIATELY. The security of our country is at risk. But I need the resources to put together a messaging campaign of this magnitude. == | | | | | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | | | | RECOMMENDED READS DAILY WIRE: == WASHINGTON POST: == FOX NEWS: == In Service, Dan Crenshaw | | | | | == | | By providing your phone number, you agree to the terms & privacy policy (ckq.io/49500) for recurring autodialed marketing messages from Team Crenshaw to the phone number you provide. No consent required to buy. Msg&data rates may apply. | | Crenshaw for Congress | 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007 | | Sent by mailto:dan.crenshaw@crenshawforcongress.com

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Most finance teams aren’t totally transparent about this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
(You can cancel anytime if your budget changes)
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210717-2001-header&t=1&akid=2001%2E434096%2ET6Jdt1)
Peter,
I wanted to circle up on how you can have big stake in our campaign with an impact that will carry us for a long way:
[**_Would you be able to set up a monthly, small-dollar donation of $5, $10, $27, or any amount to our campaign? Setting up a monthly contribution is easy and secure, and you can cancel any time if your budget changes._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22229?refcode=em20210717-2001&t=2&akid=2001%2E434096%2ET6Jdt1)
**[Donate Monthly »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22229?refcode=em20210717-2001&t=3&akid=2001%2E434096%2ET6Jdt1)**
Most finance teams aren’t totally transparent about this, but the only way a campaign is able to plan ahead is by projecting how much money there will be the following month.
For example, you might have heard that we’re finally opening our first official campaign office in Pittsburgh at the end of the summer. Well, the only reason we will be able to sign the lease in July is because, back in May, we were confident we had enough monthly donations coming in to cover the deposit.
We’re only going to keep growing from here — more campaign offices, more events, more organizers, more flyers, more clipboards, and more Funyuns.
But it really all depends on monthly donations, which is why I’m emailing you today. **Like, if we can count on $10 from Peter in your state, then we’ll be that much more confident that we can hire an organizer in Franklin County in the fall.**
[**_So please, can you set up a monthly, small-dollar donation of $5, $10, $27, or any amount to our campaign? It’s easy, secure, and can be canceled at any time, and it's the single most impactful thing you can do for the future of our campaign._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22229?refcode=em20210717-2001&t=4&akid=2001%2E434096%2ET6Jdt1)
**[Donate Monthly »](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22229?refcode=em20210717-2001&t=5&akid=2001%2E434096%2ET6Jdt1)**
Thanks a bunch for supporting our campaign. 💙
Eric Stern
Deputy Campaign Manager
John Fetterman for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210717-2001-footer&t=6&refcode2=2001_434096_T6Jdt1&akid=2001%2E434096%2ET6Jdt1)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=7&akid=2001%2E434096%2ET6Jdt1)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=2001%2E434096%2ET6Jdt1)

name: Larry Elder
subject: My Story: What the California dream USED to be, Peter...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR GOVERNOR 2021
body:
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57956972:Jkn17MlNc:m:1:3253819041:AD118CAB692D249546C0F788EDED4AC2:r)

---
Peter,

My name is Larry Elder and I'm a business owner, talk show host, author, a contributor on Fox News and above all, I'm a proud Californian.

But I can't stand to watch Gavin Newsom destroy our state or let the Democrats continue their assault on middle and working-class Californians - **which is why I 'm announcing that I am running for Governor of California as a Republican in the recall election!**

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57956972:Jkn17MlNc:m:1:3253819041:AD118CAB692D249546C0F788EDED4AC2:r)
My high school-dropout father worked TWO full time jobs as a janitor in Los Angeles. But he was a hard worker, he saved his nickels and dimes until he could buy us a house in South Central Los Angeles.

At that time, **this was the American dream and California was where people came to achieve it.** Now, our over-reaching, leftist dominated government has made this dream nearly **impossible to achieve.**

Today's California is a sad state of affairs. **Our taxes are rising almost as fast as our crime rates, and our homeless population accounts for 25% of the whole country 's and only is growing under a Democrat dominated government.** [**We must end the Democrats ' full control of our state before it's too late, Peter. Can I count in you to help me do that?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57956972:Jkn17MlNc:m:1:3253819041:AD118CAB692D249546C0F788EDED4AC2:r)

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57956972:Jkn17MlNc:m:1:3253819041:AD118CAB692D249546C0F788EDED4AC2:r)
Enough is enough, and I refuse to watch while Gavin Newsom ruins our state with abusive executive order after executive order. His draconian control has gone too far!

During the pandemic, he dined for $35,000 at the French Laundry without a mask with the same health officials and lobbyists that imposed the shutdown! **Meanwhile businesses he didn 't frequent weren't allowed to stay open. He shut down in-school learning while his own children enjoyed the luxury of private in-school instruction.**

I'm absolutely sick and tired of watching our state crumble under Newsom's failed Democrat-led dictatorship. **Our businesses should be open, our schools should be open. Opportunity doesn 't come from prolonged covid stimulus that should have ended months ago. It is forged in a thriving and free economy and top-notch schools - neither of which exists in California under Newsom.**

Peter, I know that I have what it takes to restore California to its former state of bountiful opportunity, but I'm going to need you on my team every step of the way. With only a short amount of time remaining until the election, [**will you join my team?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57956972:Jkn17MlNc:m:1:3253819041:AD118CAB692D249546C0F788EDED4AC2:r)

[**California is in desperate need of strong, common-sense conservative leadership right now and I 'm willing to step up to the plate to help stop Gavin Newsom from further destroying California. Are you with me?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57956972:Jkn17MlNc:m:1:3253819041:AD118CAB692D249546C0F788EDED4AC2:r)

Thank you,

Larry Elder

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57956972:Jkn17MlNc:m:1:3253819041:AD118CAB692D249546C0F788EDED4AC2:r)

| | PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR GOVERNOR 2021

name: Karen Bass
subject: Showing solidarity for Chairwoman Joyce Beatty's fight for voting rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Karen Bass for Congress
body:
**Show solidarity for Chairwoman Joyce Beatty 's fight to defend our right to vote. [Add your name NOW demanding Congress protect the right to vote »](https://act.myngp.com/el/0ChujwXny0kyKFi_6AweuxoxPJ_6EtDMWKOIl1mgkQ8=/BPyxpLX8gsxZvfnSFBHFw9k1YuoxFH643f1R7n1V0DE=?gpsid=39_132_19779&ms=em21_210717_arst_adv_gq_act_vra_kb_ettx&refcode=em21_210717_arst_adv_gq_act_vra_kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210717_arst_adv_gq_act_vra_kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)**
---

Hello,

This week, my friend and colleague, Congressional Black Caucus Chair Joyce Beatty, was arrested in the U.S. Capitol while protesting for voting rights. She and other activists were peacefully marching to defend our right to vote.

After her arrest, Chairwoman Beatty said, "You can arrest me. You can't stop me. You can't silence me." **These activists were making Good Trouble, team.**

**[I'm standing in solidarity with Chairwoman Beatty and the countless Black and brown Americans across the country who are demanding Congress protect our sacred right to vote. Will you add your name now demanding Congress bring the John Lewis Voting Rights Act to a vote?](https://act.myngp.com/el/0ChujwXny0kyKFi_6AweuxoxPJ_6EtDMWKOIl1mgkQ8=/BPyxpLX8gsxZvfnSFBHFw9k1YuoxFH643f1R7n1V0DE=?gpsid=39_132_19779&ms=em21_210717_arst_adv_gq_act_vra_kb_ettx&refcode=em21_210717_arst_adv_gq_act_vra_kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210717_arst_adv_gq_act_vra_kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)**

Today happens to be the one-year anniversary of Congressman John Lewis's passing. Congressman Lewis dedicated his entire life to fighting for civil rights and defending the right to vote. And in 2021, his fight lives on in all of us.

Republican politicians have enacted 28 restrictive voting laws across 17 states and nearly _400 additional bills_ are being proposed. These laws directly target Black communities, and they're being justified by Donald Trump's Big Lie that the 2020 election was stolen. We can't let this injustice stand.

**[I am calling on Congress to bring the John Lewis Voting Rights Act to a vote to restore the original protections of the Voting Rights Act of 1965. I need you to add your name, team. Will you join me?](https://act.myngp.com/el/0ChujwXny0kyKFi_6AweuxoxPJ_6EtDMWKOIl1mgkQ8=/BPyxpLX8gsxZvfnSFBHFw9k1YuoxFH643f1R7n1V0DE=?gpsid=39_132_19779&ms=em21_210717_arst_adv_gq_act_vra_kb_ettx&refcode=em21_210717_arst_adv_gq_act_vra_kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210717_arst_adv_gq_act_vra_kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass&fn=&ln=&pc=18326&em=dpwillis67@gmail.com)**

If Congressman Lewis was still with us today, I know without a doubt that he would be leading the fight for voting rights in our country. Now, we need to pick up the torch and continue to march forward for social justice.

In solidarity,

Karen

Karen Bass started as a community organizer, so she knows just how much a $5 or $10 donation can do. Help fuel her movement to make social and economic justice for all a reality by chipping in today.
[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/0ChujwXny0kyKFi_6AweuxoxPJ_6EtDMWKOIl1mgkQ8=/iND0E3xvjswwk3PVjdHmXCjcYq7YCHS2flNi_BQygl4=?gpsid=39_132_19699&refcode=em21_210717_arst_adv_gq_act_vra_kb_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210717_arst_adv_gq_act_vra_kb_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass)

Washington, DC 20003 United States

clean_body: | = Earlier this week, millions of families received the first installment of monthly payments through the Child Tax Credit — another benefit of the American Rescue Plan passed by Democrats earlier this year. This crucial monthly payment — which was passed without the support of a single Republican in Congress — will drastically improve the lives of families across the country and is expected to cut child poverty in half. Senate Democrats are committed to working to meet the needs of working families, and we must do everything we can to support them to continue making lasting progress for millions. Will you chip in $10 or any amount to help protect and expand our Democratic Senate majority so that we can continue investing in American children and families? If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = With a strong Democratic Senate, we can fight to expand health care coverage, address the climate crisis, and strengthen voting rights for millions across the nation. Now is a once-in-a-generation opportunity to get it done, and we need your help. Mitch McConnell and the Republicans will stop at nothing to block our progress and leave families in the dust. We’re fighting back and supporting Democrats in crucial battleground states like Florida and Ohio. Grassroots supporters are instrumental in our work to defend and expand our Democratic Senate majority. Can you pitch in to protect the progress we’ve made so far and prevent Republicans from standing in our way? clean_body: I need you to fight alongside me. | I trust you know that I'm fighting every second of every day to SAVE AMERICA. Friend, I trust you know that I'm fighting every second of every day to SAVE AMERICA. I'm doing it because I truly love America too much to watch it turn into a SOCIALIST NATION at the hands of Joe Biden and the radical Left. Every time I see another Patriot make a contribution to stand with me and save our Country, I'm inspired to fight EVEN harder for you. I'm really counting on YOU to step up and make a contribution to help me DEFEND AMERICA. I expect to see your name on the next donor list, Friend. Thank you, Donald J. Trump 45th President of the United States Paid for by Save America JFC, a joint fundraising committee of Save America and Make America Great Again PAC. | | | Friend,

name: Ron DeSantis
subject: There is a Crisis at Our Southern Border
body:
Today, I am heading to Texas for a firsthand look at the raging crisis on our country’s southern border.
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x465FN23-iSdppxKV7aYtOAaCSYr-fKGrI8CjDGeKfM68B3I0loUjIy0yYVKUMTIvRTwltKhfnM1wXTfUaFyuFOdmj0g4AFJ-RYPvejoPyH-FUfIHi9w77OWnbFQi4W8AEy4Bco1oP_RLsrv-SqNfg==&c=q2HtunshWOXf_W5YfEV89x90UQkFnc0pjRIh9vQEppnxaXLB8kCWrw==&ch=jrNMAqLqY9tGcoriXc7YiSvaUehlHQ3OvJ6Esewf1Pw3DBt3pQIKwA==)
---
| Peter,
Today, I am heading to Texas for a firsthand look at the raging crisis on our country's southern border. By undoing the effective policies of President Trump, Joe Biden's administration is single handedly responsible for creating this crisis. We went from the lowest level of illegal immigration in several decades to the highest level in 20 years simply due to the open borders approach of Joe Biden. Vice President Kamala Harris was tasked with fixing this crisis, but she couldn't even be bothered to go to the actual border to see for herself the flood of drugs, crime, and human trafficking that is pouring into America. If Joe Biden and Kamala Harris choose to pander to the left-wing, open borders base of their party rather than keep our nation safe, then it is up to the rest of us to do what is necessary to combat this crisis. That's why when the governors from Texas and Arizona asked for help, I was the first governor to send resources. I am thankful for the men and women of Florida law enforcement who are stepping up to the plate and securing our country. The wave of crime, drugs, and human trafficking doesn't just impact the communities on the border in Texas and Arizona. The effects of Joe Biden's open borders policies are felt in Florida and across every state in America. I will continue upholding my duty to keep Floridians safe, and securing our border is an important part of that duty. [Chip in $25, $15, or just $5 to help me continue my mission to secure our southern border. ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x465FN23-iSdppxKV7aYtOAaCSYr-fKGrI8CjDGeKfM68B3I0loUjNfWWnIdTPUrKdB67CPZIvrP3DLm3LDQkiBwDhBAX2lOIkcuGGIc4xrzrOyZRCx1xx9JxyEdArHcHl_O56PSsBCdFmTQAKbM5Lb-UwuiM_y2VqVxtJUMl-8P5uazJlZ_oRQEXVOz14ultUUoTsFmHx0btpWhlJccXWspXoDd4wm5sTODs9J7pCJmU_t0aE0Hz--Y_JLx669q1edc8mNvS3vcQOxKgt0rtcMj2BR29Xqu&c=q2HtunshWOXf_W5YfEV89x90UQkFnc0pjRIh9vQEppnxaXLB8kCWrw==&ch=jrNMAqLqY9tGcoriXc7YiSvaUehlHQ3OvJ6Esewf1Pw3DBt3pQIKwA==)
Sincerely, Ron DeSantis

clean_body: Today, I am heading to Texas for a firsthand look at the raging crisis on our country’s southern border. | | | | == | Peter, Today, I am heading to Texas for a firsthand look at the raging crisis on our country's southern border. By undoing the effective policies of President Trump, Joe Biden's administration is single handedly responsible for creating this crisis. We went from the lowest level of illegal immigration in several decades to the highest level in 20 years simply due to the open borders approach of Joe Biden. Vice President Kamala Harris was tasked with fixing this crisis, but she couldn't even be bothered to go to the actual border to see for herself the flood of drugs, crime, and human trafficking that is pouring into America. If Joe Biden and Kamala Harris choose to pander to the left-wing, open borders base of their party rather than keep our nation safe, then it is up to the rest of us to do what is necessary to combat this crisis. That's why when the governors from Texas and Arizona asked for help, I was the first governor to send resources. I am thankful for the men and women of Florida law enforcement who are stepping up to the plate and securing our country. The wave of crime, drugs, and human trafficking doesn't just impact the communities on the border in Texas and Arizona. The effects of Joe Biden's open borders policies are felt in Florida and across every state in America. I will continue upholding my duty to keep Floridians safe, and securing our border is an important part of that duty. == Sincerely, Ron DeSantis | | == | Share This Email== | == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- | VISIT US AT == | == == == | Sponsored by Friends of Ron DeSantis. | | | | | | | | Friends of Ron DeSantis | 610 S. Boulevard, Tampa, FL 33606 | | Sent by mailto:info@rondesantis.com

body:
Josh Shapiro is trying to shut it down.
| Peter,
---
Just minutes after I initiated the forensic audit of the 2020 elections in Pennsylvania, George Soros' handpicked attorney general, Josh Shapiro, said he's going to try and __shut it down__.
---
**_What do they have to hide?_**
---
Shapiro is the likely Democrat nominee for Governor of Pennsylvania and will try to make shutting down my audit a key part of his campaign.
---
I need your urgent help fighting back.
---
[**Please make a contribution to help me fight back against Josh Shapiro 's attempts to shut down the forensic audit of Pennsylvania's 2020 elections.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957027:65P63MlHN:m:1:3253819041:355436D91977291BD0B7CC3A62DAC68F:r)
---
**[CONTRIBUTE NOW](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957027:65P63MlHN:m:1:3253819041:355436D91977291BD0B7CC3A62DAC68F:r)**

---
Peter,
---
I have officially initiated the process for a forensic investigation of the Pennsylvania 2020 election.
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957027:65P63MlHN:m:1:3253819041:355436D91977291BD0B7CC3A62DAC68F:r)
---
[Source: Associated Press]
---
_I have already requested information from counties across Pennsylvania with a deadline to comply by July 31._
---
_As a citizen of the freest nation in the world, YOU have a RIGHT to know that our elections are honest and fair -- and I promise to fight to uncover the truth about the 2020 election for you._
---
[**Please make a contribution as we move forward with the forensic audit of the 2020 election in Pennsylvania.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957027:65P63MlHN:m:1:3253819041:355436D91977291BD0B7CC3A62DAC68F:r)

**[CONTRIBUTE $25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957028:65P63MlHN:m:1:3253819041:355436D91977291BD0B7CC3A62DAC68F:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957029:65P63MlHN:m:1:3253819041:355436D91977291BD0B7CC3A62DAC68F:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $75](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957030:65P63MlHN:m:1:3253819041:355436D91977291BD0B7CC3A62DAC68F:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957031:65P63MlHN:m:1:3253819041:355436D91977291BD0B7CC3A62DAC68F:r)**

**[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957032:65P63MlHN:m:1:3253819041:355436D91977291BD0B7CC3A62DAC68F:r)**

---
From last-minute rule changes that accommodated ballots received after 8 p.m. on election night 2020, to hundreds of sworn affidavits alleging fraud, _you have every reason to be suspicious about the 2020 elections in Pennsylvania._
---
All I'm asking for is a transparent and thorough investigation to prove to U.S. voters that our votes were fairly counted, and that we have nothing to worry about.
---
But according to Democrats, that's too much to ask. Everyone on the Left is attacking me for initiating this audit.
---
Even the _Associated Press_ called me an "ultra-conservative."
---
If fighting for the integrity of your vote makes me an "ultra-conservative," then so be it. But I prefer the term _American._
---
I trust you know that I will not stop fighting to deliver transparency and security to our elections. But at this critical moment, I'll need you to stand by my side.
---
[**So please, make a contribution as we move forward with the forensic audit of the 2020 election in Pennsylvania.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957027:65P63MlHN:m:1:3253819041:355436D91977291BD0B7CC3A62DAC68F:r)

name: Laura Loomer
subject: "Absurdly cruel"
body:
Cubans are standing up against their Communist dictator and I applaud them.
| | | [](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/rJrTIyVWbHewaDFuaS14HA/9mT0g892Em0SrBBubTOh8W892Q)
Patriot,

[](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/rJrTIyVWbHewaDFuaS14HA/9mT0g892Em0SrBBubTOh8W892Q) Cubans are standing up against their Communist dictator and I applaud them.

But Democrats STILL don't get it.

Rather than recognize that the Cuban people want freedom, radical leftists like Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez are pushing to prop up the Communist regime by lifting the embargo!

AOC showed her total ignorance by saying the embargo was, "the US contribution to Cuban suffering" and "absurdly cruel."

She fails to recall that the Communist Cuban regime that positioned missiles just 90 miles off the coast of Florida, has largely remained unchanged.

The embargo was put in place by the United States in order to not support the communist dictatorship of Cuba.

Clearly, AOC wants to enable our enemies by ending the embargo and allowing money to flow into the hands of communist dictators in Cuba.

Look, we know AOC puts America last in every aspect of her policy decisions . . . but she's getting away with it because she is THE most popular Democrat in the House.

Both Democrats and Republicans fear her power on social media and never want to confront her.

I do want to confront her . . . and I have.

When I confronted AOC in 2019 about her support for terrorist regimes, she literally RAN across the street to avoid me.

She and her fellow communist comrades won't be able to do that in Congress when I'm elected. She'll be forced to hear my words that will become part of the Congressional record for eternity.

Help me make that happen and [**send me to Congress to confront an ignorant communist**](https://libersend.lauraloomerforcongress.com/l/jaHkxHkvgw3mMH3vyc0Hsw/rJrTIyVWbHewaDFuaS14HA/9mT0g892Em0SrBBubTOh8W892Q) whose time has come.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

name: Team Derek
subject: We’re running Trump’s traitors out of town
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Derek Marshall for Congress
body:
We just kicked Matt Gaetz & Marjorie Taylor Greene out of the Inland Empire

Hi Peter,
We have a reason to celebrate today.
Donald J. Trump’s lackeys—Matt Gaetz and Marjorie Taylor Greene—were planning to come to the Inland Empire today for their “America First” rally.
But not anymore.
People all over Southern California are banding together to run these dangerous insurrectionists out of town. They’re hearing our message loud and clear now:
**This is no place for their racist fear-mongering.**

We will not give Gaetz and Greene a platform to cry about cancel culture or critical race theory. We’re not going to allow them to be propped up by the far-right so they can repeat the same lies that lead to people dying on January 6th.

But we still have a lot of work to do.

While this victory shows what is possible when we come together as a people, the fact that they falsely believed they could have a platform here is cause for concern. **Their complete disregard for the lives and well-being of others is dangerous and completely unacceptable in a civilized society. **
[**This is what we’re up against, though, and it’s exactly why we need your help.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32555155/296142332/474536728?refcode=07-17-21&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmRlYzNkMi0yOGU3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1CxvetNKaUHFR7aeDiCYPVLoWxD5wekT3U06FQOUB68=)

While we’re knocking on doors and doing the work to make sure the voices of all people are heard, these sitting members of Congress are busy doing the bidding of a twice impeached former President.

**But days like today—days when we band together and say _not in our town, not in our cities_ —give us hope. **

Together we’re proving that candidates like Derek are not able to only break through the noise and hateful rhetoric of the Republican party, but they’re taking Trump-Republicans head-on and winning. It’s because of people like you that this campaign is prepared to remove another member of the GOP from office who voted to overturn an election after an attempted coup and voted against COVID-relief during the middle of a global pandemic.
[**Can you chip in $15 right now in our fight against the Republican machine that gives people like Gaetz and Greene, a megaphone?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32555156/296142333/474536728?refcode=07-17-21&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmRlYzNkMi0yOGU3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1CxvetNKaUHFR7aeDiCYPVLoWxD5wekT3U06FQOUB68=)

Together, we are going to defeat these politicians who choose hate over love. Together, we are going to build a society that focuses on the needs of all people. Together, we will defeat Trumpisim.In Solidarity,
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32555157/296142336/474536728?refcode=07-17-21&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmRlYzNkMi0yOGU3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1CxvetNKaUHFR7aeDiCYPVLoWxD5wekT3U06FQOUB68=)
**Together, we will win.**
In Solidarity,

**Team Derek**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32555158/296142337/-370388119?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmRlYzNkMi0yOGU3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1CxvetNKaUHFR7aeDiCYPVLoWxD5wekT3U06FQOUB68=&emci=add2891a-22e7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=86dec3d2-28e7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21617867) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32555160/296142338/1746218842?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmRlYzNkMi0yOGU3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1CxvetNKaUHFR7aeDiCYPVLoWxD5wekT3U06FQOUB68=&emci=add2891a-22e7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=86dec3d2-28e7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21617867) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32555161/296142339/1746222677?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODEyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NmRlYzNkMi0yOGU3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1CxvetNKaUHFR7aeDiCYPVLoWxD5wekT3U06FQOUB68=&emci=add2891a-22e7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=86dec3d2-28e7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=21617867)

name: Zilvinas  Z  Silenas
subject: How ideas defeated the Soviet Union
body:
When the Foundation for Economic Education was founded in 1946, the United States and the Soviet Union were gripped in an ideological showdown felt across the entire world. Capitalism vs. Socialism. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c200%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=1OfwArOS9SIgzYN0F954pA&sysid=1)

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4180%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8SYNfqJy5z2LC6L%2fi%2brA%2fQ&sysid=1)

---
Friend,

When the Foundation for Economic Education was founded in 1946, the United States and the Soviet Union were gripped in an ideological showdown felt across the entire world. **Capitalism vs. Socialism**.

Through it all, FEE has never wavered in its mission to advance and defend the foundational ideas of liberty. Though Leftist academics, Hollywood, and a Communist empire spent nearly a century pushing their dangerous socialist ideology, FEE played a key role in demonstrating how free enterprise, free people, and free society brought about the most opportunity and prosperity for all.

When the Berlin Wall came down, we celebrated. When the Soviet Union finally collapsed two years later, we rejoiced as the light of liberty flourished in dark places.

The Cold War might be long over but the dangerous ideas of socialism are gaining ground once again This time, it is young Americans who are the ones facing indoctrination.

You don’t have to look far to find the troubling rise of socialist ideas. They are spouted daily in the media. Our schools are being turned into indoctrination centers that teach radically anti-capitalist and “woke” ideas.

Most concerning, studies show young Americans are developing a more positive view of socialism than of capitalism. They are being deceived into believing that socialism is about “fairness,” “equality,” and “helping the less fortunate”--they are not taught that these ideas led to the oppression and deaths of millions.

The only cure for indoctrination is education. 75 years later, and that is still FEE’s mission.

**_[FEE is keeping the flames of liberty alive by introducing the next generation to the ideas of liberty, free markets, individualism, and limited government. Can you please donate $35, $50, $100, or more today to support our mission? Donate here >>](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4181%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DY2sV3pD3UmUF4q8yJ351w&sysid=1)_**

My concern for future generations is a very personal one. I grew up in Lithuania when it was under the boot of communism. While Lithuania is certainly more free following the fortunate collapse of the Soviet Union, the disastrous effects of communism are still having a long-term impact on the country.

It is my mission, and that of FEE, to ensure America’s rising generation is told the truth about the dangerous ideas that devastated my home country and to inspire them with the principles of economic freedom and individual liberty--the very principles that have allowed America and the West to flourish. I would hate to see this great country suffer under these dangerous ideas the same way we suffered through it in Lithuania.

It’s why I’m proud to be a part of FEE’s critical mission in pushing back against these ideas and effectively engaging, inspiring, and equipping young Americans with the ideas and principles of a free society--free enterprise, individual liberty, and limited government.

Political and economic change is downstream of cultural change. We must change culture before we can expect to see free-market solutions integrated into our economy, culture, and government.

I’ve seen how effective education can be when battling propaganda. The educational programs and materials FEE provides help win the hearts and minds of the next generation.

[**Friend , I am emailing you with an urgent request. Can you please donate $35, $50, $100, or more today to reach the next generation with the ideas of liberty? Donate here >>**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4182%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1Tb1Uqg2mKZbhNnM%2fklI4A&sysid=1)

Here is how your support helps directly equip young Americans.
**FEE in the Classroom

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4183%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=YI3pWjgxBMxR%2f2BCTc6EoA&sysid=1)**
FEE in the Classroom workshops educate and inspire high school and college students on the core ideas and principles of free enterprise, limited government, entrepreneurship, and strong personal character--right in their classrooms where the Left has controlled for decades.

In the past 12 months, FEE has taught over 16,000 students in our seminars.

We cannot leave education to the Marxist professors. We have a plan to continue to educate thousands of additional students in 2021 with your support today.
**FEE’s Engaging Online Media

[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4184%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=75BCQm3BhQY2i36YWhNkWQ&sysid=1)**
FEE’s online video library is free and brings the ideas of free markets to a new generation online via YouTube and social media--achieving millions of views every year.

By producing and marketing videos, podcasts, and social media content that is engaging -- yet uncompromising -- in its pro-liberty message, FEE’s videos are providing millions of young people with an alternative to the anti-free market, big government messaging typically found in online media.
**FEE.org Commentary**
Since its founding in 1946 and the original publication of _The Freeman_ magazine, FEE has produced written commentary advocating for free enterprise, limited government, respect for private property and individualism, and voluntary, bottom-up solutions to our nation’s issues.

As one of the world’s most popular websites for the ideas of freedom, FEE.org continues to provide timely stories that teach timeless principles and are unwavering in their stances.

Your support can help introduce millions of students to the ideas of liberty. You can help FEE teach the next generation to build a brighter future.

**Please select an amount below to show your support today.**

clean_body: When the Foundation for Economic Education was founded in 1946, the United States and the Soviet Union were gripped in an ideological showdown felt across the entire world. Capitalism vs. Socialism. Friend, When the Foundation for Economic Education was founded in 1946, the United States and the Soviet Union were gripped in an ideological showdown felt across the entire world. Capitalism vs. Socialism. Through it all, FEE has never wavered in its mission to advance and defend the foundational ideas of liberty. Though Leftist academics, Hollywood, and a Communist empire spent nearly a century pushing their dangerous socialist ideology, FEE played a key role in demonstrating how free enterprise, free people, and free society brought about the most opportunity and prosperity for all. When the Berlin Wall came down, we celebrated. When the Soviet Union finally collapsed two years later, we rejoiced as the light of liberty flourished in dark places. The Cold War might be long over but the dangerous ideas of socialism are gaining ground once again This time, it is young Americans who are the ones facing indoctrination. You don’t have to look far to find the troubling rise of socialist ideas. They are spouted daily in the media. Our schools are being turned into indoctrination centers that teach radically anti-capitalist and “woke” ideas. Most concerning, studies show young Americans are developing a more positive view of socialism than of capitalism. They are being deceived into believing that socialism is about “fairness,” “equality,” and “helping the less fortunate”--they are not taught that these ideas led to the oppression and deaths of millions. The only cure for indoctrination is education. 75 years later, and that is still FEE’s mission. My concern for future generations is a very personal one. I grew up in Lithuania when it was under the boot of communism. While Lithuania is certainly more free following the fortunate collapse of the Soviet Union, the disastrous effects of communism are still having a long-term impact on the country. It is my mission, and that of FEE, to ensure America’s rising generation is told the truth about the dangerous ideas that devastated my home country and to inspire them with the principles of economic freedom and individual liberty--the very principles that have allowed America and the West to flourish. I would hate to see this great country suffer under these dangerous ideas the same way we suffered through it in Lithuania. It’s why I’m proud to be a part of FEE’s critical mission in pushing back against these ideas and effectively engaging, inspiring, and equipping young Americans with the ideas and principles of a free society--free enterprise, individual liberty, and limited government. Political and economic change is downstream of cultural change. We must change culture before we can expect to see free-market solutions integrated into our economy, culture, and government. I’ve seen how effective education can be when battling propaganda. The educational programs and materials FEE provides help win the hearts and minds of the next generation. Here is how your support helps directly equip young Americans. FEE in the Classroom FEE in the Classroom workshops educate and inspire high school and college students on the core ideas and principles of free enterprise, limited government, entrepreneurship, and strong personal character--right in their classrooms where the Left has controlled for decades. In the past 12 months, FEE has taught over 16,000 students in our seminars. We cannot leave education to the Marxist professors. We have a plan to continue to educate thousands of additional students in 2021 with your support today. FEE’s Engaging Online Media FEE’s online video library is free and brings the ideas of free markets to a new generation online via YouTube and social media--achieving millions of views every year. By producing and marketing videos, podcasts, and social media content that is engaging -- yet uncompromising -- in its pro-liberty message, FEE’s videos are providing millions of young people with an alternative to the anti-free market, big government messaging typically found in online media. FEE.org Commentary Since its founding in 1946 and the original publication of The Freeman magazine, FEE has produced written commentary advocating for free enterprise, limited government, respect for private property and individualism, and voluntary, bottom-up solutions to our nation’s issues. As one of the world’s most popular websites for the ideas of freedom, FEE.org continues to provide timely stories that teach timeless principles and are unwavering in their stances. Your support can help introduce millions of students to the ideas of liberty. You can help FEE teach the next generation to build a brighter future. Please select an amount below to show your support today. Thank you, Zilvinas "Z" Silenas President Foundation for Economic Education 107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314

Hi Peter, I'm Walt Blackman, I'm a Combat Veteran, a Conservative Patriot, and I'm running for Congress in Arizona's 1st Congressional District.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957206:6wVPJMlNY:m:1:3253819041:492226B073343041640769FB18DAC5C9:r)

I'm bringing this story from _the Daily Wire_ to the attention of every conservative and patriotic American.

⬇⬇⬇
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957206:6wVPJMlNY:m:1:3253819041:492226B073343041640769FB18DAC5C9:r)
This is very disturbing news, Peter. Teacher unions are holding our schools, teachers, and children hostage with this dangerous ideology.

If you're not sure what Critical Race Theory is and why is it so bad for America's children, I'll do a quick rundown:

**-> It teaches only the bad in American history, never the good. **
**-> It tries to sow division of Americans by race, just as Marxism divided by class. **
**-> It indoctrinates our children with anti-American propaganda. **
[**Defeat Critical Race Theory: Rush A Donation Now**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957206:6wVPJMlNY:m:1:3253819041:492226B073343041640769FB18DAC5C9:r)
Critical Race Theory is a way for the radical Left to brainwash our children and fill their heads with their radical agenda. _**Plain and simple.**_

**[If you agree, then rush $5 right now toward my effort to Defeat Critical Race Theory >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957207:6wVPJMlNY:m:1:3253819041:492226B073343041640769FB18DAC5C9:r)**
[**Defeat Critical Race Theory: Rush A Donation Now**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957206:6wVPJMlNY:m:1:3253819041:492226B073343041640769FB18DAC5C9:r)
_Want to hear the rest of my story? _

I served in the United States Army for nearly 22 years as a Front Line Tank Commander. I completed 7 tours of duty in some of the world's most dangerous battlefields, including Kosovo, Afghanistan, and Iraq, where I fought in the Second Battle of Fallujah, the bloodiest battle in the Iraq War.

My service earned me a Bronze Star for combat action in Iraq and a Meritorious Service Medal. But the most important thing I learned from my service was _**the true price of Freedom and how fragile it is.**_

You know Freedom means something a little different to veterans, warfighters, and combat vets.

We look at it a bit differently. When we see that flag, something burns deep inside--that burning we have is for a desire to preserve Freedom for everyone regardless of background.

_**We believe in Freedom.**_

**We don 't believe in burning down monuments...**

**We don 't believe in burning our flag... **

**We stand up for our flag!**

**And we stand up for the United States of America!**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957206:6wVPJMlNY:m:1:3253819041:492226B073343041640769FB18DAC5C9:r)

I'm running for Congress because I know the true price of Freedom, and I know what's at stake if we lose it.

**I 've served my country faithfully for 22 years; I hope you help me continue that service in Congress! **

**If you want to join me in my fight for Freedom, you can chip in at this secure link:****[https://secure.winred.com/walt-blackman-for-congress/action-2600500](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957206:6wVPJMlNY:m:1:3253819041:492226B073343041640769FB18DAC5C9:r)**

Thank you,
Walt Blackman

name: When Democrats Turn Out
subject: Beto: “it’s the filibuster or democracy”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter \-- the GOP is still trying to torch voting rights in Texas. And despite his best efforts, Beto O'Rourke can't take on this fight alone. So he's calling on Congress to take action: **“It's the filibuster or democracy.”** Source: **[Twitter](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32556493/296146679/859976175?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRlOTk1NjAzLTJkZTctZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mHOk_yDdJDA1ff2X5RqKPD7EKEDYtgEekvawcd-BdJE=&emci=b82651b1-5be6-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=4e995603-2de7-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=5546903)** **Beto single-handedly ended the narrative that Texas is a solid red state.** He helped send Texas Democrats to Congress \-- allowing us to keep the majority \-- and gave Democrats in Texas their best shot in decades to elect a Democrat to the Senate. Beto can help us flip Texas, but first we have to help him flip the filibuster. | **[HAVE BETO'S BACK: GIVE $25 TODAY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32556494/296146683/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210717_GEN_FDR_F&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRlOTk1NjAzLTJkZTctZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mHOk_yDdJDA1ff2X5RqKPD7EKEDYtgEekvawcd-BdJE=)**
---

The filibuster is the only thing standing in the way of our Democratic majority passing historic voting rights legislation to end the GOP's march towards authoritarianism. But **make no mistake, the GOP is currently winning this fight.** If you're with us, we can help heroes like Beto protect and even expand voting rights in their home states and across the country.

**[Peter, this time it's critical. If our grassroots network can't step up now we might never see Texas go blue. Can we count on you to chip in now to help us fight to abolish the filibuster and show Beto we're behind him in his fight against voter suppression?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32556495/296146684/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210717_GEN_FDR_F&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRlOTk1NjAzLTJkZTctZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=mHOk_yDdJDA1ff2X5RqKPD7EKEDYtgEekvawcd-BdJE=)**

subject: It’s time to end Cancel Culture
body:
Cancel culture has grown out of control as more Americans have moved into the digital space over the past decade.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010HbKDHibB1PUJc6noZ7OqhCSuG0neATRDjRQOuAJjhW5iOSw3tzBWiKRq7KCTfLXXM-BJ8jNhw2C4L-y49W6laRRcBi7KpGgbDHa2LM4lvGWAvXsVUs2L6Yf9L1qB6o9JcCXrGXIiLtvlOBXX9nt0M0UGmzc_jKK5XUXIOx6obCWPoTXTd4LhHCxlRch-Lb2q3K7oiIwbEw=&c=azhrt1m7FWwQ3HXue98ItWozCoydQbYhc-ceJguvL2ibp7CeVOCyjw==&ch=1GSHSGY8dMdgIhq8VDRYfWe-w244fHUqfE-rkZ57g5q495XkVOl4VQ==)
---
| Friend,

Cancel culture has grown out of control as more Americans have moved into the digital space over the past decade. It is now possible to make one mistake in the heat of the moment and be canceled permanently by the internet masses. Together with Big Tech, the woke cancel-culture mob is out to cancel anyone who does not share their Marxist worldview.
[Will you join me in standing up to cancel culture?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010HbKDHibB1PUJc6noZ7OqhCSuG0neATRDjRQOuAJjhW5iOSw3tzBWiKRq7KCTfLXXM-BJ8jNhw2C4L-y49W6laRRcBi7KpGgbDHa2LM4lvGWAvXsVUs2L6Yf9L1qB6o9JcCXrGXIiLtvlOBXX9nt0M0UGmzc_jKK5XUXIOx6obCWPoTXTd4LhHCxlRch-Lb2q3K7oiIwbEw=&c=azhrt1m7FWwQ3HXue98ItWozCoydQbYhc-ceJguvL2ibp7CeVOCyjw==&ch=1GSHSGY8dMdgIhq8VDRYfWe-w244fHUqfE-rkZ57g5q495XkVOl4VQ==)

---
| Free Speech is guaranteed by our First Amendment, which is why we have to stand up to the trend on America's college campuses to ensure the right to speak freely is safe. Colleges and Universities are meant to be a place for serious discussion of the issues, but instead, they've become echo chambers of liberal talking points.
It's time to secure the First Amendment and stand up to cancel culture. Can I count on your support to donate today before we all get canceled?

subject: I’m feeling discouraged, Peter

body:
My team gave me a list of conservatives who stepped up since my Impeachment Manager Opponent outraised me last quarter and your name isn't on it.
|
---
| | | Peter,

I'm feeling discouraged.

My team gave me a list of conservatives who stepped up since my Impeachment Manager Opponent outraised me last quarter and your name isn't on it.

Hope to see you on my list of supporters soon,

Marco Rubio
