name: Larry Elder
subject: What happened to the California dream, Peter?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR GOVERNOR 2021
body:
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957346:JHp9fMleN:m:1:3253819041:C611C3F019C2E2DD17997A4A18F36462:r)

---
Peter,

My name is Larry Elder and I'm a business owner, talk show host, author, a contributor on Fox News and above all, I'm a proud Californian.

But I can't stand to watch Gavin Newsom destroy our state or let the Democrats continue their assault on middle and working-class Californians - **which is why I 'm announcing that I am running for Governor of California as a Republican in the recall election!**

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957346:JHp9fMleN:m:1:3253819041:C611C3F019C2E2DD17997A4A18F36462:r)
My high school-dropout father worked TWO full time jobs as a janitor in Los Angeles. But he was a hard worker, he saved his nickels and dimes until he could buy us a house in South Central Los Angeles.

At that time, **this was the American dream and California was where people came to achieve it.** Now, our over-reaching, leftist dominated government has made this dream nearly **impossible to achieve.**

Today's California is a sad state of affairs. **Our taxes are rising almost as fast as our crime rates, and our homeless population accounts for 25% of the whole country 's and only is growing under a Democrat dominated government.** [**We must end the Democrats ' full control of our state before it's too late, Peter. Can I count in you to help me do that?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957346:JHp9fMleN:m:1:3253819041:C611C3F019C2E2DD17997A4A18F36462:r)

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957346:JHp9fMleN:m:1:3253819041:C611C3F019C2E2DD17997A4A18F36462:r)
Enough is enough, and I refuse to watch while Gavin Newsom ruins our state with abusive executive order after executive order. His draconian control has gone too far!

During the pandemic, he dined for $35,000 at the French Laundry without a mask with the same health officials and lobbyists that imposed the shutdown! **Meanwhile businesses he didn 't frequent weren't allowed to stay open. He shut down in-school learning while his own children enjoyed the luxury of private in-school instruction.**

I'm absolutely sick and tired of watching our state crumble under Newsom's failed Democrat-led dictatorship. **Our businesses should be open, our schools should be open. Opportunity doesn 't come from prolonged covid stimulus that should have ended months ago. It is forged in a thriving and free economy and top-notch schools - neither of which exists in California under Newsom.**

Peter, I know that I have what it takes to restore California to its former state of bountiful opportunity, but I'm going to need you on my team every step of the way. With only a short amount of time remaining until the election, [**will you join my team?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957346:JHp9fMleN:m:1:3253819041:C611C3F019C2E2DD17997A4A18F36462:r)

[**California is in desperate need of strong, common-sense conservative leadership right now and I 'm willing to step up to the plate to help stop Gavin Newsom from further destroying California. Are you with me?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957346:JHp9fMleN:m:1:3253819041:C611C3F019C2E2DD17997A4A18F36462:r)

Thank you,

Larry Elder

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957346:JHp9fMleN:m:1:3253819041:C611C3F019C2E2DD17997A4A18F36462:r)

| | PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR GOVERNOR 2021
---

name: Laura Loomer
subject: You vs Big Tech
body:
I'm in the final stages of a groundbreaking lawsuit against the Big Tech Mafia.
| | | | [](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/N00wcRdCExlK763kxzKgxqZA/QTyuIHNImbeJ892ENRbbZAhw) | Patriot,

[](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/N00wcRdCExlK763kxzKgxqZA/QTyuIHNImbeJ892ENRbbZAhw) I'm in the final stages of a groundbreaking lawsuit against the Big Tech Mafia.

[**And I could really use your help to cover my legal expenses to get this filed.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/N00wcRdCExlK763kxzKgxqZA/QTyuIHNImbeJ892ENRbbZAhw)

No lawsuit like this has been filed against Big Tech and my lead attorney has REAL experience taking on organized crime.

Because that's what this is: **Organized Crime!**

Facebook, Twitter, Google and Apple are illegally coordinating to influence our opinions, access our information and even interfere in our elections.

This lawsuit will be a beast, and the expenses are piling up.

[**Any help you can provide will be greatly appreciated.**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/N00wcRdCExlK763kxzKgxqZA/QTyuIHNImbeJ892ENRbbZAhw)

I'll be candid.

Like most Americans, I don't come from money and my income is month-to-month a lot of the time.

I don't have a trust fund and I don't have a Tesla like AOC.

Heck, I'm still paying my student loans.

So when I take on a massive case like this to stop the Big Tech Mafia, I do it knowing that I don't just have to do the work involved in the lawsuit, but I have to be the chief fundraiser to fund the case.

That's why I keep you informed and it's why [**I 'm asking for your support now**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/N00wcRdCExlK763kxzKgxqZA/QTyuIHNImbeJ892ENRbbZAhw).

I don't have hundreds of thousands of dollars laying around, so I ask you and a few thousand other principled Americans to come together to get this done for the sake of ending Big Tech tyranny.

We can't give up and we have to keep fighting.

If you can, [**please chip in $25, $50, or whatever amount you can afford to advance this case**](https://libersend.loomered.com/l/bZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA/N00wcRdCExlK763kxzKgxqZA/QTyuIHNImbeJ892ENRbbZAhw) and finally put an end to Big Tech's manipulation of America.

Thanks again for all that you do.

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

LAKE WORTH, FL. 33460

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: Something was missing from Biden’s voting rights speech
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
It’s not enough for the President to just talk about voting rights, Peter. He NEEDS to talk about ending the filibuster.
#
Peter,
President Biden gave a passionate speech advocating for historic voting rights protections earlier this week. He even went as far as to say that we are facing the most significant test of our democracy since the Civil War.
But something critical was missing: Biden did not say anything about the filibuster. It’s not enough for the President to just talk about voting rights, Peter. He NEEDS to talk about ending the filibuster so we can deliver on them.
**Pramila is fighting each day to end the filibuster and protect our democracy.** It’s clearly an uphill fight, and that’s why we have to ask you:
[**Can you chip in $3 today to support our fight for voting rights? Our future elections quite literally depend on action TODAY.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4636?refcode=em20210717-471&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&akid=471%2E420207%2EnzgsUk)
**[Chip in $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4636?refcode=em20210717-471&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=471%2E420207%2EnzgsUk)**
If we do not end the filibuster right away, our democracy will only face greater threats. The GOP’s shameless efforts to hide what happened on January 6 led them to use the filibuster to block the creation of a bipartisan commission to fully investigate the deadly attack on the Capitol.
But that’s not all. Republican-controlled state legislatures across the country are passing hundreds of restrictive voter suppression laws. If the GOP continues getting its way, more people will lose their right to vote and Republicans will have built in electoral advantages.
**We must take action NOW. People across America need more than speeches, they need an end to the filibuster and for the Senate to pass the For The People Act.[If you agree, chip in $3 so we can keep the pressure on our fellow Democrats to end the filibuster and deliver voting rights.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/4636?refcode=em20210717-471&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=471%2E420207%2EnzgsUk)**

clean_body: It’s not enough for the President to just talk about voting rights, Peter. He NEEDS to talk about ending the filibuster. Peter, President Biden gave a passionate speech advocating for historic voting rights protections earlier this week. He even went as far as to say that we are facing the most significant test of our democracy since the Civil War. But something critical was missing: Biden did not say anything about the filibuster. It’s not enough for the President to just talk about voting rights, Peter. He NEEDS to talk about ending the filibuster so we can deliver on them. Pramila is fighting each day to end the filibuster and protect our democracy. It’s clearly an uphill fight, and that’s why we have to ask you: If we do not end the filibuster right away, our democracy will only face greater threats. The GOP’s shameless efforts to hide what happened on January 6 led them to use the filibuster to block the creation of a bipartisan commission to fully investigate the deadly attack on the Capitol. But that’s not all. Republican-controlled state legislatures across the country are passing hundreds of restrictive voter suppression laws. If the GOP continues getting its way, more people will lose their right to vote and Republicans will have built in electoral advantages. We must take action NOW. People across America need more than speeches, they need an end to the filibuster and for the Senate to pass the For The People Act. In solidarity, Team Jayapal | | Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com

Hi Peter, I'm Walt Blackman, I'm a Combat Veteran, a Conservative Patriot, and I'm running for Congress in Arizona's 1st Congressional District.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957475:6hm8ZMlNJ:m:1:3253819041:6E548D9B674924E2FCDB82CCD51F0F0A:r)

⬇⬇⬇
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957475:6hm8ZMlNJ:m:1:3253819041:6E548D9B674924E2FCDB82CCD51F0F0A:r)
This is very disturbing news, Peter. Teacher unions are holding our schools, teachers, and children hostage with this dangerous ideology.

If you're not sure what Critical Race Theory is and why is it so bad for America's children, I'll do a quick rundown:

**-> It teaches only the bad in American history, never the good. **
**-> It tries to sow division of Americans by race, just as Marxism divided by class. **
**-> It indoctrinates our children with anti-American propaganda. **
[**Defeat Critical Race Theory: Rush A Donation Now**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957475:6hm8ZMlNJ:m:1:3253819041:6E548D9B674924E2FCDB82CCD51F0F0A:r)
Critical Race Theory is a way for the radical Left to brainwash our children and fill their heads with their radical agenda. _**Plain and simple.**_

**[If you agree, then rush $5 right now toward my effort to Defeat Critical Race Theory >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957476:6hm8ZMlNJ:m:1:3253819041:6E548D9B674924E2FCDB82CCD51F0F0A:r)**

_Want to hear the rest of my story? _

I served in the United States Army for nearly 22 years as a Front Line Tank Commander. I completed 7 tours of duty in some of the world's most dangerous battlefields, including Kosovo, Afghanistan, and Iraq, where I fought in the Second Battle of Fallujah, the bloodiest battle in the Iraq War.

My service earned me a Bronze Star for combat action in Iraq and a Meritorious Service Medal. But the most important thing I learned from my service was _**the true price of Freedom and how fragile it is.**_

You know Freedom means something a little different to veterans, warfighters, and combat vets.

We look at it a bit differently. When we see that flag, something burns deep inside--that burning we have is for a desire to preserve Freedom for everyone regardless of background.

_**We believe in Freedom.**_

**We don 't believe in burning down monuments...**

**We don 't believe in burning our flag... **

**We stand up for our flag!**

**And we stand up for the United States of America!**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957475:6hm8ZMlNJ:m:1:3253819041:6E548D9B674924E2FCDB82CCD51F0F0A:r)

I'm running for Congress because I know the true price of Freedom, and I know what's at stake if we lose it.

**I 've served my country faithfully for 22 years; I hope you help me continue that service in Congress! **

**If you want to join me in my fight for Freedom, you can chip in at this secure link:****[https://secure.winred.com/walt-blackman-for-congress/action-2600500](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957475:6hm8ZMlNJ:m:1:3253819041:6E548D9B674924E2FCDB82CCD51F0F0A:r)**

Thank you,
Walt Blackman

name: =?utf-8?Q?John=20Cox=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Masks to Stay in Schools & Disney Jobs Leave for Florida
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Cox for Governor 2021, Inc
body:
The California Health & Human Services Agency announced that it will require that K-12 students wear masks in school this fall. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/votejohncox/8jt85jsn9d-4952314?e=b8a6795190)
---
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=7846fe11a9&e=b8a6795190)
| [Donate Now](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=f3a5123bbf&e=b8a6795190)
---
## Masks to Stay in Schools & Disney Jobs Leave for Florida
Since Gavin Newsom has been in office, one thing has become clear: Newsom sets his own rules and doesn’t follow the science. Californians were reminded of this, yet again, when the [California Health & Human Services Agency announced](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=bcf87a4519&e=b8a6795190) that it will diverge from the [CDC’s guidelines](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=f487e31c26&e=b8a6795190) and **require that K-12 students wear masks in school - regardless of whether they are vaccinated or not.** In a statement made earlier this week, [John Cox called Newsom out for his latest anti-science mandate](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=53ba634857&e=b8a6795190). “Gavin Newsom continues to play pandemic politics instead of following the science and doing what’s best for California students,” Cox said. “**Newsom is stopping California from fully reopening and willfully ignoring federal guidelines when it comes to our children.** The decision to require vaccinated California students and staff to wear masks should be immediately rescinded.”
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=26cd7d49aa&e=b8a6795190)
News coverage by [NBC San Diego ](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=ed14445225&e=b8a6795190)shared how **the advocacy group, Let Them Breathe, is planning to file a lawsuit against the state** and says “the quickly-growing organization doesn’t see this mandate as effective, but rather, detrimental.” Meanwhile, [**Los Angeles is reimposing the indoor mask mandate**](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=34611e92b4&e=b8a6795190) starting today at 11:59 p.m. Newsom’s Emergency Powers that are at play in allowing L.A. to require masks for vaccinated people is appalling. This needs to stop. With less than two months until the [recall election](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=49f05237ce&e=b8a6795190), thankfully we don’t have to wait much longer.
### Disney Moving 2,000 Jobs to Florida
Elon Musk isn’t the only cultural icon to be fleeing California. Mickey Mouse seems to be next in line to pack his bags, or at least a couple thousand of Disney’s employees. News broke Thursday that Disney plans to [**relocate 2,000 California jobs to “Florida’s business-friendly climate”**](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=bb303f8234&e=b8a6795190). Yesterday, John spoke to the media in front of the iconic Disneyland sign as he called out the need for change in California.“Disneyland calls itself the ‘Happiest Place on Earth.” Sadly, it looks like Disney is happier and happier in Florida,” said Cox at a [press conference yesterday.](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=8d612cb43a&e=b8a6795190) **“The failures of California politicians are driving businesses out of California. That will end when I’m governor.”**
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=10cda58a29&e=b8a6795190)
### Tour to End Homelessness Continued in Palm Springs
John continued his statewide homelessness policy tour by making a stop at Baristo Park in Palm Springs on Tuesday. The trash ball “symbolizes the mess created by homelessness and the failures of career politicians to fix it,” [**NBC Palm Springs reported**](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=6f6be04f72&e=b8a6795190).
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=9d8ac0815a&e=b8a6795190)
**CalMatters dug into the numbers and policy on the homelessness crisis and pointed to John’s solutions in an**[**article published Thursday**](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=42f9e7755a&e=b8a6795190) , and shared quotes from a recent press conference. “First, you’ve got to have treatment first, not housing first, treatment first,” Cox said. “And yes, we’re going to have to force people into that treatment if need be.” The old way of doing things hasn’t worked. As Gavin Newsom has spent billions of our tax dollars on housing, homelessness has only increased. Newsom’s revised budget proposal includes spending $8.75 billion on the Homekey program. Meanwhile, the revised budget only allocated $750 million to build behavioral health treatment facilities. **It’s time for a plan that will address the root causes of homelessness.**
[](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=31394f5ee1&e=b8a6795190)
| [Read John’s Homelessness Policy Plan](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=a028c492b2&e=b8a6795190)
---
### Your Support Will Help Defeat Newsom
Thank you to those who came out to offer your support at Tuesday’s fundraiser in San Diego. **I am running for governor because I want to end the double standards coming from the political insiders who are literally driving people out of the state.** You deserve better, we all do! But I can’t do this alone. Please contribute now and we will put an end to the self-serving hypocrisy and turn this state around.
| [Contribute Now & Recall Newsom](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=1823183dc1&e=b8a6795190)
---
| [Follow the Beast](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=ccbb254c38&e=b8a6795190)
---
### [VoteForTheBeast.com](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=8e54dcea68&e=b8a6795190)
| | | | [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=08ad9ea855&e=b8a6795190)| [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=c087c3c62f&e=b8a6795190)| [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=8665b4035a&e=b8a6795190)| [](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=10a3383e43&e=b8a6795190)
---|---|---|---
### [About the Beast](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=affeb27a2e&e=b8a6795190)
John is a businessman - **a self-made political outsider** \- with big plans to **shake-up Sacramento** and cut taxes to save California.As someone who **doesn't owe the establishment anything** , John will work for the people of California to cut taxes, eliminate homelessness, make housing more affordable, and get our kids back in school.**California is out of control thanks to career politicians** and insiders who look out for their own interests, rather than those of the average Californian.John built his business from the ground up and **understands the needs of Californians in a way the career politicians who are running this state into the ground never will**. John’s had to scratch and claw to survive and succeed, and he's ready to fight for you.
| | | Paid for by John Cox for Governor 2021, Inc. FPPC ID #14377013525 Del Mar Heights Rd # 1077San Diego, CA 92130-2199
[Add us to your address book](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=f57da22256) [Update Preferences](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=f57da22256&e=b8a6795190&c=3a7ee72a06) | [Unsubscribe](https://johncox.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=df0f4cc15345d235cccd912c0&id=f57da22256&e=b8a6795190&c=3a7ee72a06)

body:

|
---
| | | Peter,

I'm feeling discouraged.

My team gave me a list of conservatives who stepped up since my Impeachment Manager Opponent outraised me last quarter and your name isn't on it.

Marco Rubio

disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter, Nancy Pelosi just set the date: **On July 27, the House select committee will hold its first hearing on the January 6 insurrection.** Minority Leader Kevin McCarthy is following Senate GOP boss Mitch McConnell's obstructionist cues on this. McConnell invoked the first legislative filibuster of the Biden era to kill a bill that would have established an independent commission on the riot. And now, despite Pelosi giving him a fair chance to appoint House Republicans to the committee, McCarthy has yet to name his roster. Enough stalling. Now that McCarthy has a hard deadline, **Nancy** **Pelosi has the GOP by the collar.** | **[SUPPORT OUR INVESTIGATORS](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32565731/296184155/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210717_GEN_FDR_L&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ3ODE5ZjRlLTVmZTctZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lLm57olbYsMC-PpHjjCzkdPFN4zOWibyuE_qPaEkTCw=)**

name: Larry Elder
subject: My Story: What the California dream USED to be, Peter...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR GOVERNOR 2021
body:
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957551:6mrhXMlNI:m:1:3253819041:1FE00778DBB1A5485F4751A69B5AB9B7:r)

---
Peter,

My name is Larry Elder and I'm a business owner, talk show host, author, a contributor on Fox News and above all, I'm a proud Californian.

But I can't stand to watch Gavin Newsom destroy our state or let the Democrats continue their assault on middle and working-class Californians - **which is why I 'm announcing that I am running for Governor of California as a Republican in the recall election!**

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957551:6mrhXMlNI:m:1:3253819041:1FE00778DBB1A5485F4751A69B5AB9B7:r)
My high school-dropout father worked TWO full time jobs as a janitor in Los Angeles. But he was a hard worker, he saved his nickels and dimes until he could buy us a house in South Central Los Angeles.

At that time, **this was the American dream and California was where people came to achieve it.** Now, our over-reaching, leftist dominated government has made this dream nearly **impossible to achieve.**

Today's California is a sad state of affairs. **Our taxes are rising almost as fast as our crime rates, and our homeless population accounts for 25% of the whole country 's and only is growing under a Democrat dominated government.** [**We must end the Democrats ' full control of our state before it's too late, Peter. Can I count in you to help me do that?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957551:6mrhXMlNI:m:1:3253819041:1FE00778DBB1A5485F4751A69B5AB9B7:r)

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957551:6mrhXMlNI:m:1:3253819041:1FE00778DBB1A5485F4751A69B5AB9B7:r)
Enough is enough, and I refuse to watch while Gavin Newsom ruins our state with abusive executive order after executive order. His draconian control has gone too far!

During the pandemic, he dined for $35,000 at the French Laundry without a mask with the same health officials and lobbyists that imposed the shutdown! **Meanwhile businesses he didn 't frequent weren't allowed to stay open. He shut down in-school learning while his own children enjoyed the luxury of private in-school instruction.**

I'm absolutely sick and tired of watching our state crumble under Newsom's failed Democrat-led dictatorship. **Our businesses should be open, our schools should be open. Opportunity doesn 't come from prolonged covid stimulus that should have ended months ago. It is forged in a thriving and free economy and top-notch schools - neither of which exists in California under Newsom.**

Peter, I know that I have what it takes to restore California to its former state of bountiful opportunity, but I'm going to need you on my team every step of the way. With only a short amount of time remaining until the election, [**will you join my team?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957551:6mrhXMlNI:m:1:3253819041:1FE00778DBB1A5485F4751A69B5AB9B7:r)

[**California is in desperate need of strong, common-sense conservative leadership right now and I 'm willing to step up to the plate to help stop Gavin Newsom from further destroying California. Are you with me?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957551:6mrhXMlNI:m:1:3253819041:1FE00778DBB1A5485F4751A69B5AB9B7:r)

Thank you,

Larry Elder

[** HELP LARRY RESTORE CA **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57957551:6mrhXMlNI:m:1:3253819041:1FE00778DBB1A5485F4751A69B5AB9B7:r)

| | PAID FOR BY ELDER FOR GOVERNOR 2021

Before our mid-month deadline at midnight, friend, I've got to ask one more time: **[Can you chip in just $5?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32566450/296195105/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk137-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjgxOWYzMS02NGU3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NMT_B5TkYePVzcf28li7XaWatrkEzh1yXSZ5n69TYmQ=)**
That's all we need from everyone in this movement to hit our goal on time – and then focus on our _ultimate_ goal: flipping Arizona blue and doing the real work of helping our state thrive.
This team has pushed so hard to get to where we are right now. This race is now so competitive that Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight has rated it a pure toss-up. And we know that Arizona will be 2022's top battleground state.
But this isn't about just one victory. It's about 7.3 million victories: the wins that will become possible for every single Arizonan as soon as we flip this governorship blue and start enacting our vision for voting rights, education, jobs ... all of it. The catch is that it all depends on hitting goals like the one tonight.
Yes, the GOP will spend millions to defeat us. But I know that our movement is capable of blowing the GOP out of the water. We have this within us. We just have to prove it before midnight.
**[So right now – for voting rights, for health care, for education, for Arizona – please donate $5, or as much as you can spare, and help us become the best version of this state: one with a Democratic governor and no more GOP extremism. We only have until midnight, so pitch in now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32566451/296195106/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk137-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjgxOWYzMS02NGU3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NMT_B5TkYePVzcf28li7XaWatrkEzh1yXSZ5n69TYmQ=)**
Thanks for everything,

Marco
* * *
**Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:**
Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, [please chip in to power our fight forward.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32566452/296195107/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk137-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjgxOWYzMS02NGU3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NMT_B5TkYePVzcf28li7XaWatrkEzh1yXSZ5n69TYmQ=) Thank you so much.
– Marco Lopez | | | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32566453/296195108/1742512187?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk137-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQ2MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjgxOWYzMS02NGU3LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NMT_B5TkYePVzcf28li7XaWatrkEzh1yXSZ5n69TYmQ=)

name: Jim Inhofe
subject: We must remain UNITED
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF JIM INHOFE
body:
| | We must remain UNITED! |
#### [View this email online](http://email.senatepatriot.com/q/1m7152NoXLqetBwXCwmj/wv)
---|---
| | |
---
| | Dear friend,
President Biden is the most radical leftist president we've seen. He's opening the border, defunding the military, abandoning our allies and the people of Cuba, promoting taxpayer-funded abortions, raising taxes, spending us into inflation and working to undermine our elections. The Republican party must be united to defeat Democrats in next year's election so we can stop this agenda in its tracks.
I'm proud the Oklahoma Republican Party recognizes this. [We are - and must remain - united. ](http://email.senatepatriot.com/c/1WA69s8ZwMAAnEEPWLO5gG)Elections aren't personality contests - they're about winning. That’s what our Oklahoma GOP is focused on. While there are efforts going on all around the country trying to divide Republicans, I'm proud that Oklahoma is not falling prey to it.
Thank you,
Jim Inhofe
---
| | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF JIM INHOFE
---
PO Box 13300

Oklahoma City, OK 73113
| [ ]()
---
